Language: c++
Cataclysm - Dark Days Ahead. A turn-based survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
Language: c++
Truly independent web browser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenTTD/OpenTTD
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenTTD/OpenTTD
Language: c++
OpenTTD is an open source simulation game based upon Transport Tycoon Deluxe

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PCSX2/pcsx2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PCSX2/pcsx2
Language: c++
PCSX2 - The Playstation 2 Emulator

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TrinityCore/TrinityCore
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/autowarefoundation/autoware_universe
Language: c++

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/azerothcore/azerothcore-wotlk
Language: c++
Complete Open Source and Modular solution for MMO

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cyberbotics/webots
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cyberbotics/webots
Language: c++
Webots Robot Simulator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dmlc/xgboost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dmlc/xgboost
Language: c++
Scalable, Portable and Distributed Gradient Boosting (GBDT, GBRT or GBM) Library, for Python, R, Java, Scala, C++ and more. Runs on single machine, Hadoop, Spark, Dask, Flink and DataFlow

ns0:entry.ns0:title: doitsujin/dxvk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk
Language: c++
Vulkan-based implementation of D3D8, 9, 10 and 11 for Linux / Wine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dolphin-emu/dolphin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dolphin-emu/dolphin
Language: c++
Dolphin is a GameCube / Wii emulator, allowing you to play games for these two platforms on PC with improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dyang886/Game-Cheats-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dyang886/Game-Cheats-Manager
Language: c++
Easily download and manage single-player game cheats for your convenience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: electron/electron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/electron/electron
Language: c++
Build cross-platform desktop apps with JavaScript, HTML, and CSS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hrydgard/ppsspp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hrydgard/ppsspp
Language: c++
A PSP emulator for Android, Windows, Mac, Linux and iOS, written in C++. Want to contribute? Join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/5NJB6dD or just send pull requests / issues.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kuzudb/kuzu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kuzudb/kuzu
Language: c++
Embedded property graph database built for speed. Vector search and full-text search built in. Implements Cypher.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: luanti-org/luanti
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/luanti-org/luanti
Language: c++
Luanti (formerly Minetest) is an open source voxel game-creation platform with easy modding and game creation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moonlight-stream/moonlight-qt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moonlight-stream/moonlight-qt
Language: c++
GameStream client for PCs (Windows, Mac, Linux, and Steam Link)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mumble-voip/mumble
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mumble-voip/mumble
Language: c++
Mumble is an open-source, low-latency, high quality voice chat software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: optiscaler/OptiScaler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/optiscaler/OptiScaler
Language: c++
OptiScaler bridges upscaling/frame gen across GPUs. Supports DLSS2+/XeSS/FSR2+ inputs, replaces native upscalers, enables FSR-FG/XeFG on non-FG titles. Supports Nukem mod for DLSSG-to-FSR3 FG.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: organicmaps/organicmaps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/organicmaps/organicmaps
Language: c++
🍃 Organic Maps is a free Android & iOS offline maps app for more than 6M travelers, tourists, hikers, and cyclists. It uses crowd-sourced OpenStreetMap data and is developed with love by the community. No ads, no tracking, no data collection, no crapware. Please donate to support the development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shadps4-emu/shadPS4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadps4-emu/shadPS4
Language: c++
PlayStation 4 emulator for Windows, Linux, macOS and FreeBSD written in C++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: telegramdesktop/tdesktop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/telegramdesktop/tdesktop
Language: c++
Telegram Desktop messaging app
